companyNameJapanese: フェローテックホールディングス株式会社
description: Develops, manufactures, and sells products for semiconductor and FPD manufacturing equipment including vacuum seals, quartz products, ceramics, silicon products, and wafer products. Also provides thermo-modules and magnetic fluids.

_externalRelationships.notes: Supplies vacuum seals, quartz products, ceramics, silicon products for semiconductor manufacturing equipment. Replacement demand grows with increased fab production.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, CNBC, TradingView, Ferrotec Global
_metadata.notes: All-time high: 6,930 JPY (Jan 26, 2026). EBITDA: 50B JPY, margin 17.46%. Q4 net income: 3.63B JPY (+35.8% QoQ). Founded 1980. Global supply system for small-diameter wafers.
